....snippet: Finding: Wiki-links (...) ARE supported via the Obsidian package

wikilink.snippet: Every wikilink creates a directional edge in a document graph.…

wikilinks.snippet: The practical finding: For a markdown KB with wikilinks, the graph already exists in the content.…
Parses Obsidian vault into graph (files=nodes, wikilinks=edges)

Wikilinks.snippet: Toggle in Settings > Files & Links > "Use Wikilinks"
Obsidian supports two link formats, controlled by "Use Wikilinks" toggle in Settings > Files & Links:

Y.snippet: …10 An agent can suggest missing links — "article X mentions Y but doesn't link to the Y article, consider adding Y"
